let _ip = '{IPFilter}';

let Net = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}

| summarize IPList = make_set(IP), Mac = take_any(MacAddress) by DeviceId;
let Base = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}

| join kind=leftouter Net on DeviceId
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| where _mac == '' or Mac has _mac
| where _ip == '' or tostring(IPList) has _ip
| extend NameLc = tolower(coalesce(DeviceName,''))
| extend IsCamera = DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo','AudioAndVideo') or NameLc has_any ('cctv','nvr','dvr','ipcam','hikvision','dahua','axis','vivotek','pelco','arlo','reolink','amcrest')
| extend IsPrinter = DeviceType =~ 'Printer' or NameLc has_any ('printer','prn-','laserjet','officejet','copier','mfp','mfd','xerox','ricoh','konica','kyocera')

| extend IsIoT = DeviceType in~ ('IoTDevice','SmartAppliance','CommunicationsDevice','VoIPPhone','GameConsole','MediaPlayer') or OSPlatform in~ ('IoT','Embedded') or NameLc has_any ('thermostat','hvac','bms','plc','scada','hmi','iot-','sensor','beacon','kiosk','pos-','atm-','vending','badge-reader','intercom')
| extend IsMobile = DeviceType in~ ('MobilePhone','Smartphone','Mobile','Mobile','Tablet','Mobile') or OSPlatform in~ ('iOS','iPadOS','Android','AndroidEnterprise')
| extend IsComputerType = DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Desktop','Laptop','Server')
| extend IsWindowsLikeEndpoint = OSPlatform has_any ('Windows10','Windows11','WindowsServer','macOS','Linux')

| extend IsCameraFinal = IsCamera and not(IsComputerType) and not(IsWindowsLikeEndpoint and not(DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo','AudioAndVideo')))
| extend IsPrinterFinal = IsPrinter and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsNetInfraFinal = IsNetInfra and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsIoTFinal = IsIoT and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsMobileFinal = IsMobile and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsComputer = IsComputerType or (IsWindowsLikeEndpoint and not(IsCameraFinal or IsPrinterFinal or IsNetInfraFinal or IsIoTFinal or IsMobileFinal));
Base
